hero.title: Welcome to BetterOrmoc
hero.subtitle: Your Gateway to Ormoc City Services
hero.description: Access government services, connect with officials, and stay informed about your city.

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.description: BetterOrmoc is an independent, open-source project created to improve access to public information. This is not an official government website.

metadata.defaultDescription: Empowering the people of Ormoc with transparent access to services, programs, and public funds of LGU Ormoc.

home.title: Home
home.description: Access government services, programs, and public information for Ormoc City, Leyte, Philippines.

services.title: Municipal Services
services.description: Browse all available services from LGU Ormoc including permits, certificates, and assistance programs.

government.title: Government Officials
government.description: Meet the elected and appointed officials serving the people of Ormoc City.

about.title: About BetterOrmoc
about.description: Learn about our mission to improve transparency and access to public information in Ormoc City.

statistics.title: City Statistics
statistics.description: View demographic, economic, and social statistics for Ormoc City.

budget.title: Budget Transparency
budget.description: Explore Ormoc City's budget allocation and financial transparency data.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with LGU Ormoc or report issues and suggestions.

search.title: Search Results
search.description: Search for services, officials, ordinances, and more.

ordinances.title: City Ordinances
ordinances.description: Browse local laws and ordinances passed by the Sangguniang Panlungsod of Ormoc.

resolutions.title: City Resolutions
resolutions.description: View resolutions approved by the Sangguniang Panlungsod of Ormoc.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about government services and procedures.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.description: Our commitment to making public information accessible to everyone.
